texto: Who would want to get back together with Taylor Swift after having dated her? I'm sure dating her is like talking to a white sheet of paper with a little bit of vanilla ice cream on it that doesn't say anything.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kurt Braunohler: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Who would want to get back together with Taylor Swift after having dated her? I'm sure dating her…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, together, ice-cream pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de ice-cream e want.
